items.summary: Redesign the app's color palette with a fresh, cohesive visual theme. Update the CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css for all themes (dark, light, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, ocean). Choose a distinctive primary accent color away from blue/purple — such as emerald green or teal — and apply it consistently across buttons, badges, active states, charts, and highlights. Ensure adequate contrast in both light and dark modes.
